headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
title: The world's most-starred prompt collection.
subtitle: With 150K+ GitHub stars, Prompts.chat is the definitive home for AI prompts. Browse hundreds of curated starters for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — or self-host the entire thing for your team in minutes.

headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Every video, beautifully yours.
subtitle: Macabolic wraps the legendary yt-dlp engine in a polished native Mac interface — download anything from YouTube to Instagram in up to 4K, skip sponsors automatically, and grab whole playlists without touching the terminal.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Ship to the App Store without leaving your shell.
subtitle: asc puts the full App Store Connect API at your fingertips — builds, TestFlight, screenshots, subscriptions, and code signing — all scriptable, AI-agent-ready, and CI-friendly out of the box.

headline: MUST TRY
title: Diagrams that zoom, pan, and dazzle.
subtitle: Drop one plugin into your VitePress site and every Mermaid block becomes a living, interactive diagram — fullscreen, theme-aware, and exportable as SVG or PNG with a single click.
